calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
MINI MINUTES: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the petition for claim of exemption is granted in part and denied in part. The sheriff shall release $200 to judgment creditor and release the remainder ($716.93) to judgment debtor. Thereafter judgment debtor must pay $200 per month to judgment creditor. Order signed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
